title: crinum × powellii
intro: Crinum × powellii, also known as the Red Lily, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is prized for its stunning red or pink flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bulbs of Crinum × powellii are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
